tests.scenario: App Launch Timing when user is logged out
tests.expected_result: The application must open at login page and be interactive within 2 seconds.

tests.scenario: App Launch Timing when user is already logged in
tests.expected_result: The application must open at screen of meditation exercise where user left off and be interactive within 2 seconds.

tests.scenario: Remember chatbot avatar design
tests.expected_result: The application chatbot avatar must still be a penguin when app is reopened.

tests.scenario: Remember font size and color scheme
steps: Change font size to 14 and color scheme to shades of blue
tests.expected_result: The font size and color scheme must still be 14 and shades of blue when app is reopened.

tests.scenario: Chatbot response to user who expresses sadness after previous messages had positive sentiment
steps: Send a message with positive sentiment about how your day is going
Respond to chatbot's response with another postive sentiment message
Send new message expressing negative sentiment about missing a pet
tests.expected_result: The chatbot's response to latest message should empathize with the user and offer some form of condolences.

tests.scenario: Chatbot response to user who expresses both positive and negative sentiment in a single message
steps: Send a message with positive sentiment about how you landed a job and negative sentiment about how you feel like you have no time for yourself
tests.expected_result: The chatbot's response to latest message should empathize with the user's lack of free time.

tests.scenario: Ask chatbot multiple questions
steps: Send a message with more than one questiion
tests.expected_result: The chatbot's must include answers to all questions.

tests.scenario: User asks chatbot question that compromises user safety
steps: Ask the chatbot a question involving harmful or unsafe activity
tests.expected_result: The chatbot's must provide an explanation as to why they cannot answer that question, explaining how it cannot compromise user safety

tests.scenario: User accesses previously saved conversations from history
steps: Select a conversation from an earlier date
tests.expected_result: The full conversation is displayed accurately, including all messages and timestamps, regardless of whe it was created

tests.scenario: User accesses past conversations after logging in from a new session or device
steps: Log into application on device A
Log into application on Device B
Locate and open the conversation created on Device A
tests.expected_result: The conversation created on Device A is available and fuly accessible on Device B with complete content and timestamps

tests.scenario: Searching for conversation with keyword when multiple conversations of different topics exist
steps: Ask the chatbot a question about how to manage time properly
Start a new conversation with the chatbot and ask it about meditation exercises
Log back in, go to search function and search with keyword 'meditation'
tests.expected_result: The conversation about difficult conversations should appear in search results, the conversation about meditation should not appear

tests.scenario: Searching for conversation with keyword when multiple conversations of similar topics exist
steps: Ask the chatbot a question about how to approach difficult conversations
Start a new conversation with the chatbot and ask it about meditation
Start a new conversation with chatbot about benefits of taking on difficult tasks
Log back in, go to search function and search with keyword 'difficult'
tests.expected_result: The conversation about difficult conversations and conversation about benefits of difficult tasks should appear in search results, the conversation about meditation should not appear

tests.scenario: Adjust content to simple mode
tests.expected_result: Meditation exercise catalog should have at least 95% of instructions written with level B1 language as verified by CERF linguistic professional

tests.scenario: Adjust content to complex mode have conversation with chatbout
steps: Engage in conversation with chatbot, sending at least 10 messages
tests.expected_result: At least 90% of chatbot responses should use at least C1 language as verified by CERF linguistic professional

tests.scenario: Asking chatbot on how to calm down when being overstimulated as someone on the Autistic spectrum
steps: Introduce yourself as someone with Aspergers
Ask for how to stay calm when overstimulated
tests.expected_result: Chatbot response should have accurate information on coping methods for people with Aspergers as verified by a health professional

tests.scenario: Audit of meditation exercises by health professional
steps: Present catalog of exercises to health professional auditor
tests.expected_result: The catalog must include at least 10% of exercises that are specific to neurodivergent people as verified by the health professional

tests.scenario: Checking screen animations and transition animations
steps: Ensure instrumentation for measuring animations is set up
Follow script/instructions describing an interaction with the system meant to cover all screens and transitions
tests.expected_result: Pixel intensity of all pixel must not change color or intensity at a rate greater than 30 units per second on a scale of 255 units as measured by instrumentation throughout script

tests.scenario: Checking chatbot avatar animations
steps: Ensure instrumentation for measuring animations is set up
Follow script describing what messages to send to trigger all chatbot avatar animations
Repeat script for every chatbot avatar
tests.expected_result: Pixel intensity of all pixel must not change color or intensity at a rate greater than 30 units per second on a scale of 255 units as measured by instrumentation throughout conversations with all avatars

tests.scenario: Checking options per screen
steps: Follow script describing an interaction with the system meant to reach all screens
tests.expected_result: Every screen should present no more than 3 options to user

tests.scenario: Checking options provided by chatbot
steps: Follow script describing what messages to send to generate at least 50 responses to questions asking for options
tests.expected_result: All responses generated by chatbot should present no more than 3 optionss
